reviews.title: Clueless staff with clear lack of communication
reviews.text:
This is a legendary brand but the staff at the Waldorf Shanghai is clueless, and the team lack basic communication 

Negatives 
- check in was supposed to be at 3pm but at 3pm, the new staff simply play it down and told us we need to wait another hour ++ or so because it wasn’t “ready” 
- the cafe / restaurant on site advertises as a place to chill and drink for hotel guest on their website and pamphlet but when I was there, the staff told us we MUST order their high tea, which contradicts what they’re promoting 
- the staff is like playing roulette and at times you will get friendly staff and at times you get attitude from them 
- the deposit was also another ridiculous issue. The cost of the hotel was about $3.5k USD ++. But then we staff insist that our “deposit” for the stay is around 15k RMB which is ridiculous for a 5–6-night stay in a normal room 

Much is left to be desired. 

Positives 
- the duty manager in-charge, *** was fantastic and special mentioned has to be given to him for handling the issue 

Takeaway
- your stay will pretty much depend on the experience of the staff which is something not expected of a legendary 5-star brand 
It’s alright to stay over here overall

reviews.title: Very luxurious hotel but could do with some modern
reviews.text:
Was a great hotel to stay at 
Very good location on the Bund and lovely swimming pool and gym facilities
The restaurant service was not nearly up to scratch
My mother and I went to eat at the hotels restaurants at 9 pm at night only to find that not a single one of the hotels restaurants would serve food at that time
We resorted to in room dining which was an absolute disgrace
We did complain and received a credit and apology from the manager but really this is totally unacceptable from a 5 star hotel
Breakfast was ridiculously expensive so we chose to walk to the nearby 5 star western hotel and eat there which had a cafe and numerous restaurants to choose from
I feel that a hotel of the standard of the Waldorf needs to modernise its approach to dining especially for westerners travelling to china
As more food choices and dining Choices are needed if wanting to compete with other 5 star hotels as it would influence my choice of hotel for future stays
reviews.positives: Great position on the Bund , also very luxurious rooms and lovely swimming pool and gym facilities

reviews.title: Good hotel, historic building, great location
reviews.text:
The hotel was all in all excellent. 

I have rated the room at "almost poor" when it comes to cleanliness due to a single live cockroach in the bathroom. Common in China but did not expect to find this at the Astoria. 

I was also upgraded upon arrival to a junior villa but the excitement was short lived as I discovered that the room was not facing "the Bund" as originally paid for. the view was of semi destroyed properties/rooftops from neighboring building

reviews.title: Lovely stay with beautiful rooms
reviews.text:
The entire hotel is gorgeous and oozes luxury from the moment you step in. Room was spotless and and absolutely beautiful. A blend of old world charm and modern technology. Walk in wardrobe that lights up as you step in, tv in the bathroom mirror and the toto wc. Lots of marble used especially the bathroom which I really liked and I had a bubble bath everyday. Bed was also extremely comfortable. 

Service was patchy at times. The concierge was really helpful when we arrived at the bund entrance and helped us to lug our luggage to the other end if the hotel to check in. Staff at the check in counter was efficient but I didn't feel the warmth. We had tea and lunch at peacock alley where the female staff were cold and indifferent but we received good service from a male service staff whom I presume to be a manager.
reviews.positives: Design, nice bed and bathroom

reviews.title: Great in-room features but disappointing service
reviews.text:
Booked an junior suite through agoda and upon checked-in and realising that i needed a better bund view, i requested for a "paid' upgrade to another suite. The front-desk lady offered a price that she claimed was very competitive but much later i found out that i could've gotten a much better rate had I directly reserved via hilton's website.

This incident apart, the hotel offers top-class service and my suite was excellent, but I do not think I'll get back anytime soon (there's always Peninsula and Hyatt around the corner).
reviews.positives: great views of the bund

reviews.title: Great hotel but not very baby friendly
reviews.text:
We stayed at this hotel to attend a friend's wedding reception. Although this hotel is beautiful and very classy, it is not very baby friendly. We ended up carrying the stroller up and down steps, to get to the elevator, to get to reception, to get to the wedding ceremony, etc. I think more consideration should have been put into making it more stroller or wheelchair friendly.

I also was not happy with the room service. I purposely called in my room-service order 3 hours early and set the time I would like my food delivered but it was still over 45 minutes late.
reviews.positives: Classy, high-end, good service. Staff speak good English.

reviews.title: Excellent location on the Bund
reviews.text:
Amazing location. You can get to the bustling night life in the Yu Garden area to the South, and massive shopping zone in the North/Northwest, all within a 10-minute walk.
Alas the hotel has no location inside which allows a broad view of the Bund – probably a regulatory restriction more than the hotel’s fault.
Slight hiccup occurred at check-in, when we arrived early at around 1pm and was told the room would be ready in approx. 1.5hrs. We came back at 3.20pm and the room wasn’t ready and was then told the normal check-in time is 4pm etc etc. The department head took over our case, but in the end, we still had to wait till around 4pm as other guests got their rooms ahead of us.
The service recovery was reasonable though, as they made sure our room was immaculate. They even delivered a red velvet cake and greeting card for our anniversary.
The gym is reasonable but doesn't have any barbell with heavy free weights for serious lifters. The pool is 18m length – good for hotels located in expensive city zones.
Overall look and feel of the hotel comes across and new (they recently renovated) and classy.
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing to stay at the Waldorf Astoria Shanghai on the Bund. We hope the century‑old charm of the Bund and our sincere, elegant service have left you with unforgettable experiences. Thank you once again for staying with us, and we look forward to welcoming you back.

reviews.title: Great Rooms, But Lacking the Full Experience
reviews.text:
Here’s the refined full review with that included:

⸻

I had an overall pleasant stay at the Waldorf Astoria Shanghai on the Bund. The property itself is beautiful, with a strong sense of heritage and elegance, and the rooms are spacious, comfortable, and well maintained. The facilities also meet the expectations of a five-star hotel.

That said, there were a few disappointing aspects. None of the restaurants or common facilities offer views of the Bund — something you would naturally expect from a hotel in this location. Apart from the rooms, you don’t really get to enjoy that iconic view, which feels like a missed opportunity.

The check-out experience was also underwhelming. While it was quick, it felt very transactional and lacked any personalization. There was no interest in how the stay had been, no engagement, and even a slight hesitation when it came to assisting with luggage. It didn’t reflect the level of service you expect from a luxury hotel and felt closer to a 2-star check-out experience.

Overall, a beautiful property with strong fundamentals, but the service consistency and experience design — especially at departure — could be significantly improved.

We hope the century‑old charm of the Bund and our sincere, elegant service have left you with unforgettable experiences. Thank you once again for staying with us, and we look forward to welcoming you back.

reviews.title: Brilliant
reviews.text: I must start by saying I was a bi miffed. When I booked I thought I would be staying in an old hotel. I ended up in the annex which is brand new. That said by the end of my stay I could not have cared less. I really liked this hotel. Ace bed. Many features, having a wireless keyboard for the internet was great, though the internet was pretty slow so beyond emailing it was not much use. The TV in the bathroom mirror was great and the self open/flushing loo lots of fun. My own gas mask in the wardrobe was a nice touch as well... The staff were very helpful and the hotel was nice, especially when you wandered in to the old bit. The bar I went to saw packed with ex-pats so I took a swerve on that one. Overall a great place to stay and a hop skip to the delights of the bund.
reviews.positives: Location. Features

reviews.title: A great place to travel with mom.
reviews.text: The pool view is so-so, but I’m completely satisfied with the facilities. I've heard that meals are around 60,000 won, which isn’t bad. However, is it a Chinese holiday? The number of options for breakfast was significantly reduced, haha. Still, I stayed for two days and ate everything, so it was fine. I had such good breakfasts that I didn't eat anything outside in China. However, I was a bit disappointed that the bread, which I like to be filled with butter, was dry? Overall, it was quite light, but there were various types of butter available, and both the jam on the table and the buffet jam were great. The cooking was top-notch. I was satisfied with the accommodation since the view of the Oriental Pearl Tower was a comfort for those like my mom and me who find walking a bit tiring. Also, when I said I needed ice because I was sick, they understood right away and even brought extra plastic bags—very thoughtful. The service was excellent, and everyone was proactive and kind, from the restaurant staff to the front desk and bellboys. They were all friendly. However, the total for two days of breakfast including card fees came out to about 1,330,000 won; it was a room with a river view and two beds, but... yeah, I thought I shouldn't use Naver Money. Also, the gym and pool instructors were super kind; thank you! Everyone speaks English well, and this hotel made me realize that making money and living well is the best, haha. I saw a lot of Koreans, couples with babies! I want to live that kind of life too. Oh, and the bar was nice, and I heard there was a classic elevator available, but I couldn’t open the door… so it might not be usable, just keep that in mind. Make sure to explore every nook and cranny. There’s a place close to cross to the Bund, and it's near the bus stop. But I guess those staying here won't be taking transportation, so I didn't consider the subway at all, hence I didn’t know the info. Anyway, to summarize, the people at the hotel are super kind. Oh, and there’s a convenience store 8 minutes away; they guide you to Family Mart, but personally, I recommend the Chinese brand convenience store located towards the Bund parking lot, even though crossing the street is a downside. At the back of the hotel, there’s a church? That street is nice, so go for a walk. My mom loved it. Oh, and be careful not to get scammed by taxis when crossing over to the Oriental Pearl Tower. Don’t ask the hotel to call a taxi for you... Didi is generally cheaper, almost like a premium service when taking a regular taxi to the airport. And try not to charge alcohol from the bar to your room… the service fee can add up a lot, ugh…? But still, I really like it here, and I want to come back again.

reviews.title: This is what a true five star property should be
reviews.text:
The Waldorf Astoria Shanghai has renewed my faith in five star properties.  Countless establishments the world over claim to be five star, but very few actually deliver.  The WAS is everything one would expect from a top-end property.

Pros:
- The rooms are absolutely fantastic.  They are huge and feature a multitude of modern luxuries.  For example, centralized control of room lighting, AC, drapes, and alarms from a room automation console; TV built in to the mirror in the bathroom; web-enabled TV; and IT connections hub with cables included.  The furnishings and amenities are all also top notch, as one would expect from Waldorf properties.

- Service is excellent.  Everyone we encountered in the hotel was very polite and extremely helpful.

- Location on the Bund.  The location cannot be beat for views, and proximity to tourist attractions such as Ya Yaun.

Cons:
- Entrance is obscure.  The entrance to the hotel is from a small access lane that is not prominently marked.  Not one cab driver was able to find the hotel without guidance from me.

All-in-all, if you're going to Shanghai and are accustomed to staying five star, then you really need not look any further than the Waldorf Astoria.
reviews.positives: Excellent service, phenomenal rooms, fantastic location

reviews.title: An excellent hotel
reviews.text:
Located right on the Bund, the hotel enjoys a fantastic location. The building itself carries a strong sense of history, which gives it a unique and impressive charm. It’s definitely a hotel worth experiencing at least once, especially for its atmosphere and beautiful views.

However, considering the price range, the check-in experience was somewhat disappointing. Having to stand in line and wait for a long time felt out of place for a hotel of this level. A seated, more personalized check-in process would have been more appropriate and in line with the expectations for a property in this category.

Overall, it offers a memorable stay thanks to its location and character, but there is room for improvement in service efficiency.

reviews.title: The jazz performance at the bar is a major highlight!
reviews.text: I have long heard of the Shanghai Waldorf Astoria Hotel on the Bund's great reputation. This trip was for a stopover in Shanghai on my way to Europe, so I chose to stay for one night to explore historic buildings and experience their charm. Upon arriving at the hotel entrance, I immediately felt the warmth of the enthusiastic concierge service! The butler service was attentive, making me feel at home. Special praise goes to butler Victor for his passionate service. I dined at the Hundred Flavors Garden, where the chef's skills are exceptional, reaching Michelin-level standards. Breakfast was similarly impressive, with friendly and courteous staff that left a deep impression on me! As I am a jazz lover, the jazz band and cocktails at the Long Bar allowed me to enjoy a wonderful time!

reviews.title: Very impressed by their service
reviews.text: Flew in from London from a overnight long haul with a kid. Arrived by the hotel at 8am. Jenny from reception was being extremely helpful and help us to arrange the resting place and got our room ready around 9am. Very grateful for her! Made first impression of the hotel very well. The room condition was excellent too with the unforgettable view of the river. Very well worth the money. Totally recommend!

reviews.text: It’s situated just across the Bund walkway and that it is the perfect hotel for me in Shanghai! From the food, to the service, and not to mention the beautifully decorated rooms and walkways! We felt royal during our stay and the sense of exclusivity was there. Yes it may be a little more expensive than others, but it’s worth it!

reviews.title: There's no such thing as free airport transfer; At least for this hotel.
reviews.text:
It's a good thing I confirmed with the hotel a day before leaving because they were about to charge us 1200 CNY + taxes (180+ USD) for a one way trip from the airport to the hotel. I don't care if it's an S Class, if you put 'Free Airport Transfer' in as an option for Agoda, I expect to pay no more but just the tip. I ended up booking last minute with Agoda (Mozio) for just 80 USD for a round trip with a 2012 Lexus LS460 no less. 

Other than that incident, our stay there was just perfect. Two inexpensive Michelin restaurants less than 200m away should get you going.
reviews.response: Thank you for taking the time to review your experience at Waldorf Astoria Shanghai on the Bund. We assure you that the problems you mentioned with airport transfer have been addressed according. We appreciate you alerting us to this issue, and we hope you will give our hotel a second chance if you return to Shanghai.

It was a pleasant stay in Waldorf Astoria. We stayed for 3 night. The location is just across the Bund, Hotel services are superb, check-in and check-out time are really fast.
They prepared babycot as requested and they thoughtfully provide baby's bath as well. Towels and amenities are generously provided in room. Extra pillow and blanket also available in room. Room are spacious and comfy, bathroom are great. Breakfast comes with extra RMB150 per person (have to inform them 1 day before to get this special price), great breakfast choices are provided. Totally recommended!
reviews.positives: Location, Services, Spacious and Comfy Room

reviews.title: Simply the best
reviews.text: The stay was utterly comfortable from arrival to departure. Among the best hotels I have ever stayed at.
reviews.positives: Fantastic room, fabulous food and great service

reviews.title: Supper
reviews.positives: food, decoration, location

reviews.title: luxurious
reviews.text: We loved it. The location is fantastic and the staff make you feel like a king
reviews.positives: i cant think of a single think that you might want in a room that it didn't have and of the best quality

reviews.title: Totally outstanding hotel
reviews.text: I am a seasoned traveller and have stayed in luxury hotels across the world. The Waldorf (we had 3 rooms, was an unique experience. The very epitome of service quality and decor. It is immaculate throughout, part being the old british Club of Shanghai, the other part its modern extension. They are seamless, creating the impression of a grand country house transposed into the heart of Shanghai and a few minutes easy walk to the bund with its iconic skyline. I loved every minute of it
reviews.positives: Staff, room, decor

reviews.title: Very nice food, friendly staff
reviews.text: Sunday brunch was gorgeous with wonderful live band music. Staff was friendly and helpful, able to speak in English with fluency. Business area was great with complimentary drinks.
reviews.positives: Food, free internet, complimentary business area

reviews.title: Outstanding hotel with boutique rooms
reviews.text:
We had an amazing stay at the Warldorf on the Bund, it was truly magical. The feeling of this hotel is grand yet boutique, every last detail has been specifically thought out, the design was beautiful. The rooms were a delight, and had a very boutique feel. The staff were so attentive and helpful, a doorman even walked us to a restaurant over the road, because we didn't know where it was, covering us with an umbrella. The breakfast was wonderful, with a lot of choice and outstanding food. 

It is in an excellent location to explore The Bund and surrounding areas.
reviews.positives: Service, beautiful rooms

reviews.title: Great location and liked everything
reviews.text: I was a first time tourist to shanghai and loved the position as you cold get everywhere easy and enjoyed walking on Bund just outside.
reviews.positives: Position and concierge

reviews.title: luxurious facilities
reviews.text: a well decorated and furnished hotel with excellent customer services. all staff welcomes u with friendly smiles and offer help proactively. staff speak fluent english and very professional. the hotel lobby, bars and restaurants are decorated in 1930's style and bring visitors back to old shanghai. toilets are clean. rooms are spacious with stunning view of the bund. they use salvatone ferragamo for toileteries and the bed is super comfortable. highly recommend this hotel.
reviews.positives: Excellent service

reviews.title: Would recomment for a luxirious getaway, but internet needs to be fixed.
reviews.positives: Everything is perfect, historical building is masterpiece, the location is convenient for travelers.
reviews.negatives: The internet quality is very bad, wifi didn’t even let scroll social media, not even mentioning work stuff.

reviews.title: Probably the best ever seen in SHanghai
reviews.text:
Well people. I have been visiting more than 50 hotels in Shanghai along the years and this is, so far, the best I had.
It is exactly on the bund, few minutes walking from Nanjing Road and in a magic atmosphere.
Rooms a big  but mainly extremely elegant. Nothing is out of place.  Toilet marble matches the wall color, that matches the paintings that match the pillow tissue...
Lobby and all the adjacent saloons are breathtaking and the attitude of people around the hotel is super.
It is not cheap, this, of course is the counterpart: but worths every cent you spend.
Oh, I was about to forget: don't miss the breakfast!
reviews.positives: Central, elegant, amaazing...

reviews.title: Hermoso lobby, staff grosero, cuartos abandonados y área de piscina sucia
reviews.text:
El papel tapiz de nuestra habitación se estaba despegando, no hacen bien la limpieza de la habitación y se ve que jamas limpian las ventanas con visto a the Bund. Todo el tiempo de nuestra estancia la televisión no funcionó bien. 

Los vestidores de la piscina desatendidos sin personal, lleno de cabellos el piso, no había toallas, sin amenidades para poderte duchar. 

El buffet podría tener mucha más variedad de alimentos.

Una pena que solo las áreas comunes sean preciosas

reviews.title: Gran nombre, gran ubicación pero pésimo staff e instalaciones abandonadas
reviews.text:
Una tristeza la estancia, lo único que salva al hotel es la ubicación y el lobby.

Habitaciones sucias, con el wall paper cayéndose, te volvían a poner las toallas sucias cuando pedíamos que las lavaran, las personas del desayuno sino les das propina antemano no te atienden ni son amables, parece que están molestos de que estes ahí,  muy poca variedad de alimentos en el buffet. 

Fuimos a la piscina y al área de spa, no tenían toallas, los baños llenos de cabellos el piso, no tenían amenidades, la verdad si es lamentable que tengan así el hotel.
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback of your recent stay with us at Waldorf Astoria Shanghai on the Bund. We understand the importance of guest room cleanliness, and we try to be very vigilant in this area to ensure the comfort and ease of our guests. Based upon your review, I am actively working with our housekeeping staff to ensure this does not happen again. Thank you, again, for your honest feedback, and I hope that you will consider giving us another opportunity to demonstrate our commitment to authentic, memorable guest experiences should your travels bring you back to Shanghai.

reviews.title: 夜景がとてもきれいでした。
reviews.text: 地下鉄2号線の南京東路を下車し、バンドを散歩しながらホテルまでいけます。ここまで景色を楽しむ事ができます。付近は古い洋風建築の建物がまだまでたくさん残っており、特に夜はそういった建物がライトアップされており雰囲気は良いです。ホテルの内装は大変きれいですね。新館3階にビジネスセンターがありますが、宿泊者はだれでも利用できますし、本も置いてあり、無料でドリンクやクッキーのサービスもあります。ちょっとした喫茶店みたいで利用者も少ないのでゆっくりできました。部屋はきれいですが、少し狭い感じはしました。
reviews.positives: バンドの近くで、夜景がきれいなホテルでした。

reviews.title: 素晴らしいホテル。
reviews.text:
リバービューの部屋に3泊しました。
目の前に浦東の素晴らしい眺望。
周りに部屋の中が見られる建物が無いので、
夜もカーテンを閉める必要がなく
上海タワーやその周りのネオンが綺麗でした。
スタッフはあまり愛想が良くはありませんでした。
この価格クラスのホテルにしては残念ですね。
ベッドメイクもその日のスタッフによって違いがありました。
ちょっと残念な日がありました。
ある日はベッドの横にマットが敷いてありスリッパが置かれ、
ベッドの上のカバーも取り除き、掛け布団の端が少し折られて
ベッドに入りやすくなっていて完璧でした。
しかし他の日はそれらがありませんでした。
以前ベルサイユの同じホテルに宿泊しましたが
同じ様な感じでした。
しかし、これらの事が気にならなければ
このホテル（ベルサイユも含め）は立地も良く、
建物も素晴らしいと思います。

reviews.title: 歴史のある建物でゴージャス且つ最高のホスピタリティ
reviews.text: 外灘のすぐ傍で河べりの観光に最適な場所だが、地下鉄２号線の南京東路駅へは歩いて約２０分で他の観光スポットへの移動はちょっと不便。タクシーでの移動となる。ジムやプールも綺麗で快適だった。ホテルの中でゆっくりくつろぐ旅行に最適。夕食は食べなかったが、朝食は種類も豊富で手の込んだメニューでとても美味しかった。
reviews.positives: 広くて清潔な部屋、ゴージャスな食事と建物、親切で丁寧なスタッフの対応

reviews.title: Jupert is the best!
reviews.positives: Jupert, the assistant manager for the Long Bar, was the best part of this hotel! He really made us feel welcomed to the hotel and we had a lovely time at the bar.

reviews.title: すべて素晴らしい！
reviews.text:
チエックインの時間が比較的早かったせいか、眺めのいい部屋を用意してもらうことが出来た。
外灘側の東方明珠や有名なビルの見える浦東の景色は素晴らしく、いくら見ても飽きないくらい。
また、大晦日の宿泊だったので、ホテルの外灘側の路は歩行者天国になっていて、花火を見ながらの沢山の人達とのカウントダウンがとても楽しかった！
レストランは、どれもインテリア、雰囲気、味も良かった。値段は高め。

ホテルの従業員のサービスは素晴らしく、とても優雅で気持のいい滞在ができた。
バスルームは広々していて、シャワールームと、湯船の部屋が別れており、トイレもウォシュレット完備。アメニティは、フェラガモ。
ジムとプールはあったがスパがなかった。（スパは２０１３年１月建設中）

とても満足したホテルでした。

reviews.title: 素晴らしい眺め
reviews.text:
中国出張の最終日に泊まりました。スムーズなチェックインでストレスを感じませんでした。外灘のリバービューの部屋を予約しましたが昼夜ともに素晴らしい眺めの部屋でした。外灘と浦東新区は以前夜１２時までライトアップされていたのですが１０時になると一斉にライトが消え少し不気味でしたが室内は快適でした。
残念だったのはチェックアウト後タクシーをお願いしスムーズに案内頂けましたが浦東空港まで２００元以下のところ２２５元と遠回りされました。出入りのタクシー業者なども選別して頂ければ言う事無しですね

reviews.title: 伝統とモダンさの両立
reviews.text:
外灘付近に宿泊する予定の方はこちらのホテルがお勧めですね。
従業員はとても訓練されていますので、要望を伝えると快く答えてくれます。
客質は昔ながらの上品さを保ちながら、Smart TVやタッチパネルで部屋の電気系統を操作できるので、私のような若者にとっては良い経験でした。
浴室は3人同時にダンスしても有り余るほどのスペースがあり、中世の貴族の気分を味わえました。
reviews.room_type: Double Queen Deluxe City View Room

旧正月休みに家族でホテルステイでゆっくりしました。プールやアメニティ、旧館の雰囲気ある建築など素晴らしかったです。バンドもすぐなので風景も楽しめます。

階段しかない箇所がありベビーカーで不便な部分もありましたが、ベビー用のベッドやバスなども準備されていて全体としては不自由しませんでした。値段はそれなりにしましたが(ためていたポイント活用しました)、オススメのホテルです。

reviews.title: 子連れでも安心滞在
reviews.text: 夫婦二人と3歳児、3か月の乳児での利用で、外灘に近いのですこし騒々しいかと思っていたがとても静かに過ごせた。ベビーベッドをリクエストしていたらベビー用のボディーソープ、ローションを準備してくれていたので助かった。DVDも見れるので3歳児の子供が飽きたらビデオを見せることもできて楽。内装も素敵でした☆

reviews.title: 外灘のホテル
reviews.text:
リバーサイドの部屋にしました。
お値段は高いですが、それに見合った内容だと思いました。
景色の良さに大満足し、調度品の素晴らしさに感動です。
スタッフの気配りも良く、また上海へ行ったら泊まりたいホテルです。

reviews.title: 外灘の景色を一眸
reviews.text:
雰囲気もロケーションも接客もとても良いホテルです。チェックインにはかなり早く着いたので、荷物だけでも預かって貰おうと思ったのですが、そのまま部屋に通してもらえました。
23階のリヴァ―ビュータイプの部屋からは、正に「これぞ外灘！」と言うような眺望を望めました。
その他、レストランの予約やタクシーの予約なども、スムーズにしてもらえました。
ホテル内のレストランでは、中国語が少し出来ると服務員がいろいろ話しかけてきて、丁寧に説明をしてくれたりサービスをしてくれたりと、アットホームな雰囲気で対応をしてくれます。
また泊まりたいと思うホテルでした。
そして、これは中国だからでしょうが、一応ドレスコードありらしいけれど、かなりラフな格好でも、みんな気にしていないようです。

reviews.title: 最高です。
reviews.text: 中国で宿泊した中では、とにかくすべてにおいて最高でした。部屋の質感、デザイン、サービス、食事とどれも最高に良かったです。また宿泊したいと思うホテルです。でも少し料金が高い。でもこれは仕方ないこと。

reviews.title: 명성과 달리 기본이 안되어 있는 호텔
reviews.text:
Shangri-La에서 2박을 머무는 동안 너무 좋은 상해 여행을 시작했고, 이후 이 호텔에 숙박하기 위해 왔지만, 모텔만도 못한 직원들의 태도와 호텔 수준에 돈만 버렸다는 생각밖에 안들었습니다.
우선 12월26일 오후 4시가 넘어 체크인을 하러갔지만, 예약했던 방이 없다고 했고, 아무런 설명없이 어딘가 사라진 직원이 한참 뒤 업그레이드를 해주겠지만, 40분을 더 기다려야 한다고 했고 3층에서 기다리라고만 했지만 오후 7시가 다 되어서야 준비된 방에 갔습니다. 
프런트직원은 영어 소통이 잘 되지 않았고, 목소리도 너무 작았으며, 기본적으로 조식당이 어딘지 엘레베이터가 어딘지 등의 호텔직원이라면 기본적으로 안내해주는 멘트도 없었습니다.
26일 저녁 당직이었던 여직원이 한명이었기 때문에 꼭 찾아내서 교육시키기 바랍니다. 
오히려 컨시어지 Roi라는 친구가 영어도 잘하고 친절하더군요, 그리고 3층의 Steven또한 도움주기위해 노력했지만, 답변이 늦었습니다.
입실한 방의 한가운데 샹드리에 불빛하나는 계속 깜빡거렸고, 중식당 Wai King Kong에서 100만원이상 식사를 주문했지만, 원하는 wite wine은 재고가 없어 주문을 할 수 없었습니다.
조식을 이틀간 먹었는데, 카프치노 한잔 주문하는데 3명의 다른 사람들에게 재차 요청해야했고, 역시나 영어 소통은상당히 힘들었습니다.
택시로 호텔 입구로 들어가는 길은 으슥한 뒷골목 가는 것 같아 오히려 후져보이더군요 
뭐 이런 호텔이 힐튼의 최고급 호텔인가요?
Shangri-La에서 와이탄을 바라보는것이 더 즐거웠고, 저희 와이프와 딸또한 그곳의 친절한 직원들과 주변 식당 쇼핑몰이 더 편리했다고 합니다.
개인적으로 해외출장이 많아 아고다를 상당히 자주 이용하지만, 이런 글을 남기는 건 거의 처음입니다.
또한 언급했던 내용과 관련된 컨플레인은 wechat 캡쳐사진 동영상등으로 직접 Waldorf에 전달할 에정입니다.
Shangri-La horizon club 의 즐거웠던 기억을 최악으로 만든 Waldorf 는 절대 저 금액으로 숙박해서는 안되는 곳입니다.

reviews.title: 기대만큼 정말 좋았습니다
reviews.text:
장점 
와이탄이 한 눈에 들어옵니다!!! 
1610호에 머물렀는데 뷰 너무 좋았고, 화장실 소문대로 의리의리! 공주가 된 기분이었습니다!! 그리고 침대가 푹신하고 베개가 높지 않아서 여행에서 제일 꿀잠 잤어요. 
캡슐커피 6개, 로네펠트 티백 12개, 탄산수까지 사비스라서 역시 월도프 했습니다. 
직원들 서비스가 호불호 갈려서 걱정했는데 저는 숙박 도중에 와인잔을 깨서 보증금에서 까이나 걱정했는데 아무렇지 않다고 해줘서 정말 고마웠습니다. 
체크이웃할때 한국말 해주는 직원 있었는데 택시도 잡아주면서 끝까지 배웅해주는데 감동 받았습니다:)
단점 
전철역에서는 좀 먼 듯 .. 하지만 와이탄이 바로 앞이고 택시로 다닐 생각이면 이건 흠이 아닐수도 있습니다... 
조식이 생각보다 맛있지는 않으나 커피는 맛있습니다!!

reviews.title: 景色很漂亮，但設施對兒童不太友善
reviews.text:
景色非常漂亮，早餐也非常美味且豐盛，櫃台與協助搬運行李的服務人員都相當親切。不過，此次帶小朋友入住，還是遇到一些讓人擔心的情況：

兒童安全相關設施不夠友善。
第一天下午 check-in 時，我們在搬運行李，小朋友不小心走入飯店門口的旋轉玻璃門。由於不熟悉旋轉門的運作方式，小朋友當下被困在門片之間，之後又直接被旋轉的玻璃推撞出去，手指也因此受到輕微夾傷。
當時門口沒有接待或安全人員在場協助留意，加上旋轉門持續運作，對兒童而言是相對危險、也非常不友善的設施。

入口動線對推車與親子不便。
飯店主入口前的樓梯設計，必須繞到靠近車道兩側且為吸菸區的位置，才有緩坡能讓娃娃車順利推上。這在入住時造成不便，也提高小朋友接觸二手菸的風險，不太適合作為親子旅客的必經動線。

綜合來說，雖然飯店的景觀與服務人員表現都令人滿意，但整體環境與設施在親子安全方面仍有明顯不足。也因為第一天就發生意外，讓這次的入住經驗留下不太好的印象。
希望飯店能重視兒童安全，改善出入口設施與動線，讓親子旅客能住得更安心。

reviews.title: Parfait et Inoubliable
reviews.positives:
La taille de la chambre et les lits queen size tout à fait suffisants pour 2 adultes et 2 enfants.
La qualité de l'hôtel, le petit-déjeuner.
Som emplacement à deux pas du Bund.
reviews.negatives:
Son emplacement un peu loin du métro.
Le service de chambre, nous avons attendu plus d'1h pour obtenir des serviettes supplémentaires, ce n'est pas au niveau d'un hôtel de cette classe.

reviews.title: Excellent séjour à l'hôtel Waldorf Astoria
reviews.positives: Le personnel a été extrêmement serviable. Nous avons pris une formule demi-pension et le buffet a été exceptionnel pour la soirée avant le nouvel an félicitations au chef cuisinier et au personnel de salle. Petit déjeuner très bien également.
reviews.negatives: Tout lors de notre séjour a été parfait. rien à signalé. Juste merci au personnel pour le bon moment passé. C'était la deuxième fois que nous séjournions dans cet hôtel.

reviews.title: Tout était parfait
reviews.positives:
L'hôtel est juste magnifique et très bien placé en plein coeur de Shanghai sur le Bund. La literie est juste parfaite. Le personnel est vraiment au petit soin. Le concierge Jimmy nous a beaucoup aidé concernant les différentes activités à faire, les excellents restaurants des alentours...
Le bar de l'hôtel est super avec une ambiance bien agréable, il y avait un super serveur qui s'appelle Dylan, service vraiment impeccable.
J'ai fait plusieurs hôtel au centre de Shanghai, et presque sûr que j'y retourné à cet hôtel

reviews.title: Preis und Leistung stimmen leider nicht überein.
reviews.positives: Architektur, Zimmer, Badezimmer, Auswahlmöglichkeiten beim Frühstücksbuffet. Alles 10/10. Alles perfekt.
reviews.negatives:
1. 
Ich wollte Geld wechseln an der Rezeption. Nach etwa 10 Minuten Wartezeit hatte ich keine Lust mehr zu warten. Es haben sich auch währenddessen Leute vorgedrängelt. Das Personal hat nichts dagegen getan. 
2. 
Der Fernseher hat kurz vor einem Fußballspiel der Europameisterschaft nicht funktioniert. Der Techniker konnte den Fernseher nicht komplett reparieren. Das Bild funktionierte. Der Ton funktionierte aber nicht. 
3. 
An einem Morgen musste ich beim Frühstück darauf warten, dass ein Tisch frei wird. So etwas habe ich in einem 5 Sterne Hotel dieser Kategorie (Ritz-Carlton, Four Seasons, etc.) noch nicht erlebt. 

Für einen so schlechten Service ist der Preis definitiv zu hoch.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Im Zimmer gediegener Luxus und in der Front ein tolles altes Gebäude.
reviews.negatives: Zimmer mit „City View“ kosten extra, die Aussicht vom Zimmer Richtung Stadt war das dann nicht wert. Man schaut auf an das Hotel grenzenden Gebäude, die vor allem im Dachbereich heruntergekommen sind.

reviews.title: Fast schon zu luxuriös.
reviews.positives: Ein top Hotel. Sehr luxuriös.
reviews.negatives: Ich muss leider sagen, dass das Hotel so luxuriös ist, dass ich mich dann auch schon wieder gar nicht mehr wirklich wohl gefühlt habe. Fast schon wie in einem Museum. So viel hat das teure und luxuriöse Hotel dann doch nicht zu bieten. Das reichhaltige Frühstück ist im Detail dann doch eher einem Hotel dieser Klasse entsprechend gewöhnlich und der Raum ist viel zu laut. Es gibt ein Gym, aber irgendwie war es das dann auch schon. Die Bar ist noch ganz gut.

reviews.title: Traumhafte Lage des Hotels, besser gehts nicht .
reviews.positives:
Absolut traumhafte Lage gegenüber vom Bund. Stundenlanger Genuss der Aussicht speziell bei Nacht. Wir waren nur eine Nacht dort ( auch wegen des Preises), aber das war uns der Spaß wert :-)  . Da muss man einfach mal gewesen sein .
Wichtig ist das Zimmer mit Aussicht auf den Bund

reviews.title: Ottima posizione, camera ampia e dotata di tutti i comfort.
reviews.positives: La camera era pulita e spaziosa. La struttura è molto ben tenuta e ha un bel mix di storico e moderno.
reviews.negatives: Per un hotel di questo livello non avere praticamente nessuna opzione vegana per la colazione e i ristoranti è inaccettabile.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tutto. La pulizia ed i materiali ricercati della stanza, la vista ed il comfort. Colazione eccellente e peronale cordiale con buona conoscena dell'inglese (soprattuto se pensiamo di essere in cina).

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La posizione è perfetta, e la vista dalla camera era un vero spettacolo dal piano 15
reviews.negatives: Ho cenato li ma lo chef ha cucinato la carne assieme al pesce e ho dovuto mandare indietro il piatto perche erà immangiabile . La seconda volta hanno pulito la piastra e sono riusciti a cucinare.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Hotel splendido in una delle zone più interessanti della città. Personale qualificato, colazione spettacolare. Posizione comoda e ben servita.
reviews.negatives: L'unico problema è la lingua, non parlano benissimo inglese, consiglio di munirsi di moneta locale prima della partenza, ci sono difficoltà con i cambi.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: Qualche problema con l’inglese ma ci si capisce. Nulla di significativo da segnalare .

reviews.title: Heerlijk hotel met fantastische bedden
reviews.positives: Mooi statig hotel met vriendelijk personeel op goede locatie
reviews.negatives: Eerste kamer had storing met verlichting. Hier heeft de technische dienst 30 minuten moeten “sleutelen” op de kamer. Volgende dag helemaal geen stroom meer maar toen een upgrade naar een prachtige kamer gehad en gratis ontbijt dus netjes opgelost. Al mag je dat ook wel verwachten voor 350 euro per nacht!

reviews.title: De belboys van het hotel zijn enorm gastvrij en helpen met al je vragen.

reviews.negatives: Ons uitzicht vanuit de kamer op oude gebouwen.
